batch_summary.note: S-001: SPP transport misrepresentation Jun 17 2024 (ROW-5675). Melissa misrepresents court order to shift transport obligation to Eli. ARC-RF03-001 Signal 1.

messages.text: And once she comes over to your house on weekends it's up to you to bring her home per court order
Im not lashing out. You were acting like a baby cause you had to bring her home. You then stated things that were untrue so I had to school you on it
So you will pick her up 1:15 and take her to the movie. And then you will bring her home to my house when you are done, sometime before 9pm

primary_flags.classification: RF-03 primary Sev-1 — Melissa misrepresents the SPP to shift transport obligations to Eli: 'it's up to you to bring her home per court order' (ROW-5675). Eli challenged this; Melissa doubled down and mocked him for objecting (ROW-5726: 'acting like a baby cause you had to bring her home'). ROW-5743 further unilaterally directs Eli to bring Olivia home after the movie. Per ADD-004: this is the documented pattern of Melissa imposing conditions that transfer her court-required transport obligations. ARC-RF03-001 Signal 1.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-004 (SPP transport offloading — Melissa unilaterally shifts court-ordered transport obligation).

arc_updates.event: No new signals in B-016. CANDIDATE state holds.
